title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Deleting devices
scenario: Verify that deleting devices from the device list when multiple devices are paired and connected properly removes the selected device while maintaining correct state and deletability of remaining devices.
steps: Pair and connect multiple devices to the system.
Open the device list to view all paired and connected devices.
Delete one device from the device list.
Verify that the deleted device is no longer displayed in the list.
Verify that the remaining devices are still displayed in the list.
Check that each remaining device shows the correct connected/disconnected state.
Delete each of the remaining devices one by one from the list.
Verify that each device is successfully removed after deletion.
expected: The deleted device is removed from the list. Remaining devices are displayed with correct connected/disconnected states. All remaining devices can be deleted successfully.
